# Sample AI Security Newsletter

# Research

📌 [Indirect Prompt Injection in Browser Agents](https://example.com/prompt-injection)
Researchers show how attacker-controlled webpages can inject hidden instructions into browser agents, trigger unsafe tool use, and exfiltrate user data. The item includes mitigations around provenance, tool authorization, and runtime monitoring.

# Funding

- [Acme AI raises $50M](https://example.com/funding) Acme AI raised funding to transform enterprise productivity with a next-generation platform.

# Tools

🧰 **[Agent Guard Tool](https://github.com/example/agent-guard)** - Security scanner for LLM agent tool permissions, prompt injection tests, and sandbox policy review.
